data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to BSPRT 2026-FL13
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to nine classes of BSPRT 2026-FL13, a managed CRE CLO securitization. This securitization allows for the reinvestment of principal proceeds for 30 months, with a 90-day ramp-up period included. The transaction will be backed by 35 mortgage loans with a total cutoff date in-trust balance of $700.7 million. Additionally, there is $179.7 million in cash collateral designated for the acquisition of nine pre-identified delayed acquisitions.

data.title: Leon Radvinsky, 43, passed away; created OnlyFans, a popular adult content platform using social media, reaching millions.
data.description: Using the power of social media and influencer marketing, he transformed his website into a symbol of online adult content in the 21st century.

data.title: Draganfly Stock Sheds 21% Post-Earnings — Here's Why It's Still A Buy
data.description: The stock of drone technology company Draganfly Inc. (NASDAQ: DPRO) experienced a sharp decline on Wednesday following disappointing fourth-quarter earnings results. Despite this, both the report and guidance suggest a potential speculative Buy opportunity for investors willing to tolerate volatility. DPRO stock dropped by over 21% post the latest quarterly report, driven by a larger-than-anticipated loss and revenue that missed Street estimates. The company reported a quarterly loss of 24 cents, considerably lower than the predicted 13 cents loss. Revenue also fell short by close to 19%, leading to a shift in short-term sentiment. Additionally, gross margin contracted to around 17%. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

In terms of performance, the average annual total return as of the same date was stated as a percentage in the report.

data.title: ABET Launches Recognition of Credentials Service for Micro-Credential Quality Assurance
data.description: ABET, a renowned organization in quality assurance, recently introduced their Recognition of Credentials service on March 25, 2026. This service is specifically tailored to authenticate micro-credentials and digital badges. The main aim of this new service is to uphold the quality of micro-credentials pertaining to skills-based programs that do not lead to a traditional degree. This initiative serves as a significant step toward ensuring the credibility and standards of such alternative forms of credentials in the education sector.
JBS reports record revenue of US$ 86.2 billion and closes 2025 with US$ 2 billion in net income

data.title: Dominican Republic Drives Modernization of Electronic Passports Under the Leadership of the Thales - MIDAS Consortium
data.description: In Santo Domingo, the Dominican Republic, the Presidency issued the nation's inaugural electronic passport through the General Directorate of Passports in collaboration with Thales and Midas Dominicana. This move is a part of the country's initiative to enhance national security and modernize systems. Thales, a global leader in Defense, Aerospace, Cybersecurity, and Digital technologies, played a key role in developing the new passport. This milestone marks a strategic step towards advanced security measures, with the aim to fortify protection of important data and identities.

data.title: FiscalNote Holdings Announces NYSE Notice of Delisting and Appeal Process
data.description: FiscalNote Holdings, headquartered in Washington, has disclosed receiving a notification from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) regarding the delisting of their stock. The company is set to appeal this decision through the formal process outlined by the NYSE. This news marks a significant development for FiscalNote Holdings and its investors.

data.title: XORTX Announces Share Consolidation
data.description: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a late-stage clinical pharmaceutical company specializing in gout and progressive kidney disease treatments, has received approval from its board of directors to consolidate its common shares. The consolidation, effective from March 27, 2025, will see one post-consolidation share issued for every five pre-consolidation shares. This move will not result in a name change for the company. XORTX is listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbol XRTX, TSXV as XRTX, and Frankfurt as ANU.

data.title: Karman Posts Mixed Results, Lifts Outlook On Defense Demand
data.description: Karman Holdings, a company specializing in defense products, reported a combination of positive and negative results for the fourth quarter. Despite this, the company decided to raise its future expectations due to the significant increase in demand for defense products. This decision comes as the company seeks to capitalize on the growing market by adapting its strategies accordingly. The specific numbers detailing the Q4 results were not provided in the article.

data.title: Cheesecake Factory Cooking Up Fresh Run To An All-Time High?
data.description: The Cheesecake Factory has demonstrated a positive trend in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. There are indications suggesting that the company may be on track to reach a new all-time high.

data.title: Woodside Assumes Control of Beaumont New Ammonia Operations
data.description: Woodside Energy has officially taken over the operational management of the Beaumont New Ammonia (BNA) plant in southeast Texas after completing performance testing, succeeding OCI Global. The facility, with a capacity to manufacture and export up to 1.1 million tons of ammonia annually, further broadens Woodside’s asset range. Estimated to potentially double US ammonia exports, which would facilitate regional economic expansion, the CEO Liz Westcott expressed optimism about this development.

data.title: Suncrete and Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 Announce Entering Into Non-Redemption Agreements with Certain Institutional Investors
data.description: Concrete Partners Holding, LLC, known as Suncrete, a company specializing in ready-mix concrete logistics and distribution, is strategically based in Oklahoma and Arkansas. Recently, they announced a partnership with Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 (NYSE: HYAC), a publicly traded company. This collaboration brings together Suncrete's expertise in the concrete industry with Haymaker's established presence in the market. The move is set to enhance operations in the region and drive growth for both companies. Keep an eye on the developments as Suncrete and Haymaker join forces to strengthen their positions in the industry.

data.title: Crosby Enterprises, LLC Announces Voluntary Chapter 11 Filings to Facilitate Financial Restructuring for Three Subsidiaries
data.description: GALLIANO, La., March 25, 2026 - Crosby Enterprises, LLC disclosed plans to sustain operations seamlessly while focusing on debt reduction and bolstering its financial position. The Company initiated chapter 11 cases for a few of its entities in its efforts to restructure and improve its balance sheet. This move aims to strengthen the Company's position by addressing its financial obligations effectively.

data.title: BlackRock® Canada Announces Final March Cash Distributions for the iShares® Premium Money Market ETF
data.description: BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited, a subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc., recently disclosed the final March 2026 cash distributions for the iShares Premium Money Market ETF. The cash distributions are set for unitholders of record as of March 26, 2026, with payments scheduled for March 31, 2026.

data.title: Bellwether Coffee Expands to Australia through New Partnership with Xtracted Espresso Solutions
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, innovative electric roasters are revolutionizing the way local cafes prepare fresh, high-quality coffee on-site. Bellwether Coffee is introducing easy-to-use, plug-and-play roasters that are changing the game for cafés and retailers. The company's solution, announced on March 25, 2026 in partnership with a Californian entity, aims to make in-house roasting more accessible and efficient. This development is set to significantly impact the coffee industry, offering businesses a seamless way to produce exceptional coffee products within their establishments.

data.title: Macfox Launches Easter Sale: Up to $100 Off Select Electric Bikes + Free Mirror Set
data.description: A company based in Corona, CA disclosed on March 25, 2026, an upcoming Easter Sale by Macfox. Customers looking to buy specific Macfox electric bikes can take advantage of the promotion, which includes a $100 discount. The sale applies to the X7, X1S, X1S x Bs.zay, and X2 models during the limited-time event.
